message:
fix(connectors): harden Qwen and Kimi connector edge cases

- Qwen: normalize unknown message types to "assistant" instead of
  preserving raw type strings, for forward compatibility
- Kimi: log JSONL line read errors via tracing::debug instead of
  silently continuing
- Add test verifying unknown Qwen message types are normalized

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
